title: NGN/NTN–PPDR Simulator
subtitle: Digital Twin & Next-Generation Network Simulation
description: Current work in NGN/NTN–PPDR digital twin and simulator direction. Enabling research and testing of next-generation and non-terrestrial network architectures for public protection and disaster relief communications.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The NGN/NTN–PPDR simulator enables research and testing of next-generation network architectures for public safety and disaster response. It supports non-terrestrial network (NTN) scenarios including satellite and aerial platforms. Digital twin capabilities allow for protocol validation, capacity planning, and training in PPDR communications.

sections.title: Applications
sections.content: Used for protocol validation, capacity planning, and training in PPDR communications. Supports Gulf-region and international collaboration on resilient emergency communications.
